docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NAUMIK, LIUDMILA AS TO DEFENDANT AMAR, JASMINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION RE UPDATE TO ADDRESS; FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAR, JASMINE

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-02-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-02-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COST AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAUMIK, LIUDMILA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AMAR, JASMINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
